easter-cookies-argiro.name: Easter Cookies
instructions: Initially sift the flower with baking and set aside.
Beat the music Tears with a minimum of sugar until it turns to dust.
Add the soft button to the mixer's bowl.
Add the sugar and beat at medium speed for 4-5’ until they become cream.
Dig the side bowl with spatula.
Add the zest, mastic powder and one by one the yolks.
Once homogenized, add the cognac.
Dissolve the baking soda in the orange juice and add them to the mixture.
Add the flower and at low speed mix the olderients very little until dough is formed.
Once the dough is removed from the bowl walls, leave it for 10’ covered.
The dough total weighs 850 grams.
Preheat oven to 160oC.
Cut small pieces of dough, weighing 25-30 grams.
We form in Easter plans.
Add them to a shadow baking pan between them, lined with non-stick paper.
With a brush, brush around the cookies, with some egg solution.
Place the first baking pan in the hot oven on the medium grill.
Bake for about 25′ until golden.
The cooking time is related from hour to hour, different.
We make the rest.
After they are cooked, let them cool and transfer to airtight bowls after they cool completey, cover and keep them crispy for a long time.

easter-rice-pie.name: Easter Rice Pie
instructions: Grease two 9-inch pie plates and set aside.

Make pastry: Pulse flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a food processor several times until combined. Add cold butter and pulse until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add egg and vanilla; process until dough holds together, about 30 seconds.
Transfer dough to a well-floured work surface, divide in half, and roll each piece into a 9-inch round crust. Fit crusts into the prepared pie plates and freeze for 1 hour.
Make filling: Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan; stir in rice and return to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and cook until rice has absorbed water, about 20 minutes.
Stir milk into rice and bring to a simmer; cook until thickened, stirring often, about 10 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Beat together ricotta cheese, eggs, sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest in a large bowl until smooth. Stir in cooled rice mixture and crushed pineapple until thoroughly combined.
Divide filling between frozen pie crusts.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set and the tops are golden brown, about 1 hour 30 minutes. Cool on wire racks.

edible-ginger-infused-cooking-oil.name: Edible Ginger-infused Cooking Oil
instructions: Lay ginger slices out on your dehydrator tray. Dry according to manufacturer's instructions, rotating every 20 to 30 minutes, until crisp and fragrant, about 2 hours.
Break up dried ginger into smaller pieces; transfer to a saucepan. Add coconut oil; heat gently over low heat until natural oils from ginger infuse the oil, at least 2 hours.
Strain ginger oil through a strainer to remove large pieces. Wrap cheesecloth over top of a glass jar. Pour ginger oil through cheesecloth into jar to strain again.

egg-and-avocado-breakfast-sandwich.name: Egg And Avocado Breakfast Sandwich

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Drained pickled cherry peppers or peppadew peppers

instructions: Heat broiler. Roast bell pepper on a broilerproof baking sheet, turning occasionally, until blackened in spots, 12–15 minutes. Place in a small bowl; cover tightly. Let sit 10 minutes. Peel and remove seeds.
Purée bell pepper, mango, brown sugar, vinegar, orange juice, lime juice, and cayenne in a blender, thinning with water as needed, until smooth; season with salt.
DO AHEAD: Hot sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Whisk eggs and milk in a medium bowl. Melt butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Cook eggs, stirring, until mostly set but still runny in parts, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in cheese; season with salt and pepper. Build sandwiches with rolls, hot sauce, eggs, avocado, and cherry peppers.

egg-cream-with-orange-and-cinnamon-telec.name: Egg Cream With Orange And Cinnamon
egg-cream-with-orange-and-cinnamon-telec.original_name: Creme de ovos com laranja e canela
instructions: In a pot, beat your eggs with sugar. On the other hand, dissolve the flour in orange juice, add to the previous preparation and stir well. Take the light soft until thickened, stirring constantly and without letting it boil.
Add the butter and mix quickly. Lie in a glass and let it cool. Sprinkle with cinnamon and decorate with orange and mint. Serve cold.

eggplant-bolognese.name: Eggplant Bolognese
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat; cook pork sausage, breaking it onto smaller pieces with a wooden spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes. Add ground beef; cook and stir until beef is browned and crumbly, about 5 minutes. Drain excess fat.

Pour remaining olive oil over sausage mixture; add eggplant, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Cook and stir until lightly browned, about 10 minutes. Add mushrooms and continuing cooking until tender, about 5 minutes.
Mix crushed tomatoes, diced tomatoes, parsley, oregano, and basil into sausage mixture; bring to a boil. Cover Dutch oven, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer for 30 minutes.

engagement-cookie-lezzet.name: Engagement Cookie

ingredients.item: 225 gr butter (softened in the heat of the room)
Half tea glass thin drawn walnut in

instructions: 1. knead until it comes to egg, butter and powder sugar cream consistency.
2. Add other materials and continue kneading.
3. Remove shapes with dough molds.
4. Cook and cool in oven 170 degrees.
5. Overni decorated with sugar doughs that you color according to your request and rest for an hour.
6. Serve.

enjoy-the-delicious-and-beef-salpicon-co.name: Enjoy The Delicious And Beef Scorpion
enjoy-the-delicious-and-beef-salpicon-co.original_name: Disfruta del rico y fácil salpicón de res
instructions: Reput all ingredients before production.
In a pot, place the meat, the two bay leaves, the polished garlic and cover with water. Cooking at high temperature.
When it boils, put the fire down in half and let them cook for two hours till it's soft.
Once the flag's soft, remove from the water and leave to stand. When at room temperature, clear.
Cut the tomato and onion into pieces or strips. Wash the lettuce and cut into pieces.
In a bowl, place lettuce, jitomates, fringed carrot, tanned cilantro and onion.
It incorporates flag and Saxony with salt, pepper and order to aste. It also adds lemon juice, olive oil and white vinegar.
Mix all the ingredients very well until they are properly integrated.
Serve and company with avocado and tema. Enjoy!
